docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $977.00 FILED BY HASHIMOTO KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT DELUCA JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-16-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06 TRIAL OF MAY-13-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DELUCA JOSEPH
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $250.00 FILED BY DELUCA JOSEPH AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HASHIMOTO KIMBERLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HASHIMOTO KIMBERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELUCA JOSEPH $917.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $953.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DELUCA JOSEPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HASHIMOTO KIMBERLY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DELUCA JOSEPH
